question: How does the Design Your Kitchen online tool work?
answer: Our online design wizard walks you through each part of your kitchen — layout, cabinetry style, door profile, benchtop material, handles, and finishes. At each step you see updates visually with real swatches. When you're done, you get an instant ballpark price. You can then book a free Calendly Zoom call with our design team to refine and lock in the details.
